heroHeadline: Lebanon PM Welcomes Ceasefire as Israeli Strikes Continue to Pound Beirut — Truce Excludes Lebanon Front
heroSubtitle: Lebanese PM Joseph Aoun endorsed the US-Iran ceasefire on April 8 even as Israeli airstrikes kept hitting Beirut, exposing the deal's limited scope: the bilateral halt explicitly excludes Lebanon, leaving Israel free to press its campaign against Hezbollah.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-08. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com.
